query:
-- Seed contadores con los valores actuales de cada serie para no generar duplicados
-- Presupuestos (PRES)
INSERT INTO document_counters (document_type, year, current_number, prefix)
SELECT 'presupuesto', YEAR(NOW()), 
  COALESCE(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(quote_number, '-', -1) AS UNSIGNED)), 0),
  'PRES'
FROM quotes
WHERE quote_number LIKE CONCAT('PRE-', YEAR(NOW()), '-%')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE current_number = VALUES(current_number);

-- Facturas (FAC)
INSERT INTO document_counters (document_type, year, current_number, prefix)
SELECT 'factura', YEAR(NOW()),
  COALESCE(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(invoiceNumber, '-', -1) AS UNSIGNED)), 0),
  'FAC'
FROM invoices
WHERE invoiceNumber LIKE CONCAT('FAC-', YEAR(NOW()), '-%')
  AND invoiceNumber REGEXP '^FAC-[0-9]{4}-[0-9]+$'
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE current_number = VALUES(current_number);

-- Liquidaciones (LIQ)
INSERT INTO document_counters (document_type, year, current_number, prefix)
SELECT 'liquidacion', YEAR(NOW()),
  COALESCE(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(settlement_number, '-', -1) AS UNSIGNED)), 0),
  'LIQ'
FROM supplier_settlements
WHERE settlement_number LIKE CONCAT('LIQ-', YEAR(NOW()), '-%')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE current_number = VALUES(current_number);

-- Reservas (RES) - las existentes usan formato RES-XXXXX (timestamp36), empezamos desde 0
INSERT INTO document_counters (document_type, year, current_number, prefix)
VALUES ('reserva', YEAR(NOW()), 0, 'RES')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE current_number = current_number;

-- TPV (TPV) - las existentes usan formato TPV-DATE-RAND, empezamos desde 0
INSERT INTO document_counters (document_type, year, current_number, prefix)
VALUES ('tpv', YEAR(NOW()), 0, 'TPV')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE current_number = current_number;

-- Cupones (CUP) - los cupones son códigos externos, empezamos desde 0
INSERT INTO document_counters (document_type, year, current_number, prefix)
VALUES ('cupon', YEAR(NOW()), 0, 'CUP')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE current_number = current_number;

-- Anulaciones (ANU)
INSERT INTO document_counters (document_type, year, current_number, prefix)
VALUES ('anulacion', YEAR(NOW()), 0, 'ANU')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE current_number = current_number;
